prompt: Create the compose mapping for view.recent_articles (a view entity). It should show a listing of articles in teaser view mode using a wrapper component 'my_drupal_theme:article-list' with an 'items' slot containing 3 article entity refs. Output the JSONata file for view-modes/view.recent_articles.default.jsonata

assertions.description: The expression returns a single object (wrapper component), not an array
The items slot contains type:entity nodes for node.article
No field variable access ($ is not used) since input is {}
